name: bandit.live_world_nearby_camp_visible_brazier_source_zone_gate_mcw
description: Visible deployed-brazier/source-zone gate: normal Apply inventory -> filter/select brazier -> Deploy where? -> east/right, then player-facing look/OCR must name brazier at the east target before saved f_brazier/log/SOURCE_FIREWOOD audits. No lighter/fire action keys.

steps.label: exact_items_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: The exact-items McWilliams fixture is loaded on the map before the focused deploy primitive audit.

steps.label: audit_saved_inventory_has_brazier_before_apply
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved player live-accessible carried/worn inventory contains the exact brazier item before the Apply inventory is opened
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit any Apply/deploy UI step if the exact brazier item is missing from live-accessible saved-player inventory
steps.abort_reason: exact brazier fixture item missing from live-accessible saved-player inventory before player-action deploy primitive audit

steps.label: open_apply_inventory_for_brazier_text_guard
steps.expected_visible_fact: The source-backed Apply key is sent; the following harness UI trace gate must prove the Use item inventory opened before another unsafe key fires.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_apply_inventory_open
steps.expected_visible_fact: harness-gated UI trace proves the Use item inventory opened
steps.next_step_gate: do not type inventory filter keys unless the Use item inventory-open trace is present
steps.abort_reason: harness UI trace did not prove the Use item inventory opened before filtering

steps.label: filter_apply_inventory_for_brazier_text_guard
steps.expected_visible_fact: The filter key is sent only after the Use item inventory-open trace is green; OCR is not used as the selector proof for this step.

steps.label: type_brazier_filter_for_apply_text_guard
steps.expected_visible_fact: The brazier filter text is submitted only after the Apply inventory-open trace is green; the following UI trace gate proves the highlighted filtered row.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_filtered_brazier_selected
required_patterns: openclaw_harness_ui_trace: component=inventory_selector event=state title="Use item" filter="brazier" action="redraw" selection_method="highlight_after_redraw"
steps.expected_visible_fact: harness-gated UI trace after redraw proves the Apply inventory filter is brazier and the highlighted row is the brazier item
steps.preconditions: the Use item inventory is open and the brazier filter text was typed.
steps.next_step_gate: do not press confirm unless the highlighted filtered row is proven as brazier
steps.abort_reason: harness UI trace did not prove filtered highlighted item was brazier before confirm

steps.label: select_filtered_brazier_expect_deploy_prompt
steps.expected_visible_fact: The filtered inventory row is confirmed; following harness UI trace gates must prove the returned item is brazier and Deploy where? opened.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_brazier_selected_and_deploy_prompt_open
steps.expected_visible_fact: harness-gated UI trace proves the selector returned brazier and opened Deploy where?
steps.preconditions: select_filtered_brazier_expect_deploy_prompt confirmed the filtered Apply inventory row.
steps.next_step_gate: do not send right/east unless the returned item is brazier and the Deploy where? prompt is open
steps.abort_reason: harness UI trace did not prove selected brazier plus Deploy where? before right/east

steps.label: place_prompted_brazier_east
steps.expected_visible_fact: The source-backed Deploy where? prompt accepts right/east and returns to the map; the following UI trace gate proves right/east was consumed by that prompt.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_deploy_prompt_consumed_right
steps.expected_visible_fact: harness-gated UI trace proves right/east was consumed by the Deploy where? direction prompt
steps.next_step_gate: do not save/audit east tile unless right/east was consumed by the Deploy where? prompt
steps.abort_reason: harness UI trace did not prove right/east was consumed by Deploy where?

steps.label: open_look_after_prompted_brazier_deploy
steps.expected_visible_fact: The player-facing look/inspect surface is opened after normal Apply->brazier->Deploy where?->east placement; OCR sees the look panel header/body (e.g. Survivor) before the cursor is moved east.
steps.abort_reason: look/inspect surface did not visibly open after brazier deployment; do not continue to lighter/fire proof

steps.label: look_east_at_deployed_brazier
steps.abort_reason: look/inspect east after normal brazier deployment did not OCR/name or describe a brazier; do not continue to lighter/fire proof from metadata-only f_brazier
steps.expected_visible_fact: Player-facing look/inspect east of the player names/describes the deployed brazier after the normal deployment action; OCR may read brazier as hrazıer, so the guard requires the name fragment plus the brazier description `burn things`.

steps.label: close_look_after_visible_brazier_gate
steps.expected_visible_fact: The player-facing look/inspect surface is closed after the visible deployed-brazier gate, returning toward normal map/save flow.

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_post_deploy_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after the Deploy where? prompt consumed right/east and before the post-action save is requested

steps.label: open_save_prompt_after_text_guarded_brazier_deploy
steps.abort_reason: screen text did not prove the Save and quit prompt existed before confirming post-action save
steps.expected_visible_fact: The Save and quit prompt is open after the text-guarded brazier deploy checkpoint; confirmation must not be sent before this prompt is proven.

steps.label: confirm_save_after_text_guarded_brazier_deploy
steps.failure_rule: the uppercase-Y confirmation is only trusted if the following saved-player mtime gate proves same-run writeback
steps.next_step_gate: feature proof may proceed only when audit_player_save_mtime_after_post_deploy_save is green
steps.expected_visible_fact: The proven case-sensitive Save and quit prompt is confirmed with uppercase Y so the following saved-file mtime gate can prove same-run writeback.

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_post_deploy_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after the post-deploy save confirmation
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed post-deploy save, proving the following saved-map audit reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_target_tile_for_visible_brazier_logs
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved target tile east of player contains f_brazier plus real log item metadata after visible player-action deployment
steps.preconditions: save_after_text_guarded_brazier_deploy wrote a same-run save immediately after normal item activation placement.
steps.next_step_gate: do not run or credit fuel/lighter/fire proof unless visible brazier gate plus saved f_brazier/log row are green
steps.abort_reason: visible player-action brazier deploy or log metadata missing before fuel/lighter/fire steps

steps.label: audit_saved_source_firewood_zone_after_visible_brazier_deploy
steps.required_name_contains: OpenClaw visible brazier source firewood proof zone
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved zone metadata contains SOURCE_FIREWOOD over/around the visibly deployed brazier/log target after the normal deploy gate
steps.next_step_gate: do not run or credit lighter/fire proof unless source-firewood zone metadata is green after visible brazier deployment
steps.abort_reason: saved SOURCE_FIREWOOD zone metadata missing after visible brazier deployment

recommended_test_command: python3 tools/openclaw_harness/startup_harness.py probe bandit.live_world_nearby_camp_visible_brazier_source_zone_gate_mcw (visible deployed-brazier/source-zone gate only; no lighter/fire keys)
